name: API Auth Hardening
description: Harden authentication: rate limiting, token rotation, password reset expiry, audit logging

phases.name: Security Fixes
phases.description: Critical security hardening for auth endpoints

stories.title: Add rate limiting to login endpoint
stories.description: Add express-rate-limit middleware to POST /api/auth/login. 5 attempts per IP per 15 minutes. Return 429 with Retry-After header.
acceptance: Rate limiter applied to login route only
New test covers rate limit trigger

stories.title: Add password reset token expiry
stories.description: Password reset tokens currently never expire. Add 1-hour expiry. Add created_at column to password_reset_tokens table. Check expiry on verification.
acceptance: New Prisma migration adds created_at with default NOW()
Reset token verification rejects tokens older than 1 hour
Expired token returns 410 Gone with descriptive message
New test covers expired token rejection

stories.title: Add JWT refresh token rotation
stories.description: Implement refresh token rotation. On refresh, invalidate the old token and issue a new pair. Store token family to detect reuse attacks.
acceptance: Refresh endpoint issues new access + refresh token pair
Old refresh token is invalidated after use
Reuse of invalidated token revokes entire token family
Tests cover: normal rotation, reuse detection, family revocation

phases.name: Audit & Monitoring
phases.description: Add auth event logging for security monitoring

stories.title: Add auth event audit log
stories.description: Log all auth events (login success/failure, token refresh, password reset request/completion) to a new audit_logs table. Include: event_type, user_id, ip_address, user_agent, timestamp.
acceptance: audit_logs table created via Prisma migration
All auth events logged with required fields
Audit log does not contain passwords or tokens
